calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-21-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Set For Trial On Nov-07-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Cathy Mosbrucker, of Mosbrucker & Foran, Tel. 415.398.9880, for plaintiffs;
Elaine Tanudjaja, of Bledsoe, Diestel, Treppa & Crane LLP, Tel. 415.981.5411, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court modifies its tentative ruling to PLAINTIFF CHETAN IRWIN's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions as follows: Plaintiffs must provide emails referenced in RFAs by May 6, 2016. Defendant must provide verified responses to all discovery at issue in the motion by May 13, 2016. Sanctions are due by May 16, 2016, if amended responses have not been provided. Counsel must meet and confer on an order and email to pcc@manningllp.com, by noon on May 6, 2016. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Set For Trial On Aug-01-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Continued To Jan-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
